panels.description: Topology des cœurs : ligne = cœur physique, colonne = thread HT. Couleur = état. Texte = acteur ou numéro CPU.

parsedSpec.text: {"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json","data":{"name":"A"},"transform":[{"calculate":"toNumber(datum.ht_pair)","as":"core_num"},{"calculate":"toNumber(datum.cpu) <= toNumber(datum.ht_sibling) ? 'T0' : 'T1'","as":"thread_label"},{"calculate":"datum.state === 'reserved' ? 'rsv' : datum.state === 'slot' ? datum.slot : (datum.state === 'free' || datum.state === 'housekeeping') ? datum.cpu : (datum.label != null && datum.label !== '' ? datum.label : datum.cpu)","as":"cell_text"}],"layer":[{"mark":{"type":"rect","stroke":"#111827","strokeWidth":1,"cornerRadius":4,"width":{"expr":"bandwidth('x')"},"height":{"expr":"bandwidth('y')"}},"encoding":{"x":{"field":"thread_label","type":"ordinal","title":null,"sort":["T0","T1"],"axis":{"orient":"top","labelFontSize":13,"labelFontWeight":"bold","labelAngle":0,"ticks":false,"domain":false}},"y":{"field":"ht_pair","type":"ordinal","title":"Physical Core","sort":{"field":"core_num","order":"ascending"},"axis":{"labelExpr":"'Core ' + datum.value","labelFontSize":11,"ticks":false,"domain":false}},"color":{"field":"state","type":"nominal","scale":{"domain":["free","vm","irq","quadlet","run","claim","reserved","slot","housekeeping"],"range":["#37872d","#1f60c4","#e0752d","#2eb8ae","#ff7383","#8f3bb8","#5c1a1a","#e0b400","#3d3d3d"]},"legend":{"title":"State","orient":"right","labelFontSize":12,"titleFontSize":12}},"tooltip":[{"field":"cpu","title":"CPU #","type":"nominal"},{"field":"state","title":"State","type":"nominal"},{"field":"slot","title":"Slot","type":"nominal"},{"field":"label","title":"Actor","type":"nominal"},{"field":"group","title":"Thread Group","type":"nominal"},{"field":"scheduler","title":"Scheduler","type":"nominal"},{"field":"priority","title":"Priority","type":"nominal"}]}},{"data":{"name":"B"},"transform":[{"window":[{"op":"min","field":"Time","as":"min_t"},{"op":"max","field":"Time","as":"max_t"}],"groupby":["cpu"],"sort":[{"field":"Time","order":"ascending"}],"frame":[null,null]},{"calculate":"datum.max_t > datum.min_t ? (datum.Time - datum.min_t) / (datum.max_t - datum.min_t) : 0.5","as":"t_norm"},{"calculate":"clamp(datum[\"Value #B\"], 0, 1)","as":"v_norm"},{"loess":"v_norm","on":"t_norm","groupby":["cpu"],"bandwidth":0.15,"as":["t_norm","v_norm"]},{"lookup":"cpu","from":{"data":{"name":"A"},"key":"cpu","fields":["ht_pair","ht_sibling"]}},{"calculate":"toNumber(datum.ht_pair)","as":"core_num"},{"calculate":"toNumber(datum.cpu) <= toNumber(datum.ht_sibling) ? 'T0' : 'T1'","as":"thread_label"}],"mark":{"type":"area","interpolate":"monotone","line":false,"opacity":0.9,"blend":"soft-light","clip":true,"color":"#ffffff"},"encoding":{"x":{"field":"thread_label","type":"ordinal","sort":["T0","T1"]},"xOffset":{"field":"t_norm","type":"quantitative","scale":{"domain":[0,1]}},"y":{"field":"ht_pair","type":"ordinal","sort":{"field":"core_num","order":"ascending"},"bandPosition":1},"y2":{"field":"ht_pair","bandPosition":1},"yOffset":{"field":"v_norm","type":"quantitative","scale":{"domain":[1,0]}},"detail":{"field":"cpu","type":"nominal"}}},{"mark":{"type":"text","fontSize":11,"fontWeight":"bold","align":"center","baseline":"middle","limit":140},"encoding":{"x":{"field":"thread_label","type":"ordinal","sort":["T0","T1"]},"y":{"field":"ht_pair","type":"ordinal","sort":{"field":"core_num","order":"ascending"}},"text":{"field":"cell_text","type":"nominal"},"color":{"value":"#ffffff"}}}],"width":"container","height":"container","config":{"view":{"stroke":null},"background":"transparent","axis":{"grid":false}}}

panels.title: $host

panels.description: Actors currently running on housekeeping cores with no RT isolation. Non-zero requires admin action (free cores, then restart or remigrate the actor).
panels.title: Active Fallbacks - $host
